summary: Made two surgical seam edits to strengthen chapter continuity without changing beats: the opening now explicitly lands the scene on the morning after Mira's hearing, and the closing beat now hands off more directly into the registry work that opens the next chapter.
edits: Clarified the opening time jump so Chapter 13 starts explicitly the morning after the hearing fallout in Chapter 12.
Adjusted the final line so Mira opens the ledger before returning to work, bridging more cleanly into Chapter 14's registry scene.
